title: Item Cleaner Pro
description: An Update Version Of Just Item Cleaner Mod.
body:
Have you ever felt that using the /kill @e[type=item] command to clean up items and the /kill @e[type=!player] command to kill entities is very complex and time-consuming?  

If you think so, this mod will help you.  

This Mod is an update version of [Just Item Cleaner Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jic).  

This mod is a commissioned work by a netizen, so it uses another repository.  

You can clean items on the ground more quickly by pressing key "0" (can be set in Controls) or entering command /itcl, instead of command /kill @e[type=item].  

You can also clean entities more quickly by pressing key "1" (can be set in Controls).  

This mod is for client only.
